programme.desc: Stunning new archaeological evidence provides clues about the Egyptians who built the Great Pyramid of Giza—and how they did it. Join researchers as they delve into the logbook of a work crew and discover how the massive project transformed Egypt.

programme.title: History Detectives: Hot Town Poster/ Face Jug/ Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: We get to the bottom of an old protest poster, referring to the police as 'pigs on the street.' Then, we investigate an antique jug with a grimacing face. Lastly, an old rock with a Spanish inscription threatens what we know about U.S. history.

programme.title: Nature: Spy in the Wild: The North
programme.desc: Travel to the Northern Hemisphere, where the spy creatures learn how animals move, feed and fight. A spy hummingbird films millions of butterflies, and a spy squirrel finds itself in a battle. A spy beaver watches other beavers building dams.

programme.title: H2O: The Molecule That Made Us: Crisis
programme.desc: Learn how Earth's changing water cycle, and water for profit, is forcing changes across the globe.

programme.title: Nova: Decoding the Pyramids
programme.desc: Stunning new archaeological evidence provides clues about the Egyptians who built the Great Pyramid of Giza—and how they did it. Join researchers as they delve into the logbook of a work crew and discover how the massive project transformed Egypt.

programme.title: The Amazing Human Body: Grow
programme.desc: Learn how humans begin life as a single cell and, over the course of a lifetime, grow into beings of more than 37 trillion cells. Plus, explore new discoveries that can help humans live longer, healthier lives.

programme.title: Shakespeare Uncovered: Much Ado About Nothing With Helen Hunt
programme.desc: Explore this exquisite comedy of comparison and contrast, as well as what the ultimate 'ado' about 'nothing' really means, with Academy Award-winning actress Helen Hunt. Much Ado About Nothing is one of 15 plays that Shakespeare set in Italy.

programme.title: Civilizations: The Second Moment of Creation
programme.desc: Examine the formative role of art and the creative imagination in the forging of humanity itself. Images and artifacts found in Africa, Asia, Europe, Australia and South America testify to the urge to develop civilizations.

programme.title: Nova: Polar Extremes
programme.desc: Join renowned paleontologist and host Kirk Johnson on an epic adventure through time at the Polar Extremes of our planet. Johnson uncovers the bizarre history of the poles, from miles-high ice sheets to warm polar forests teeming with life.

programme.title: NCIS: Day in Court
programme.desc: In order to clear his name, a petty officer volunteers to be court martialed if NCIS agrees to conduct its own investigation after his murder case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant. Also, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers

programme.title: NCIS: Spinning Wheel
programme.desc: After Ducky is attacked by a man claiming to have information about his half-brother who died decades ago, the team searches for the perpetrator. Also, with the holidays approaching, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship.

programme.title: WWE NXT

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Terror in the Taxi
programme.desc: Houston taxi cab drivers become the deadly target to a couple in love with each other, power, and money.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: UFOs Over England
programme.desc: The hunt for alien life continues in Zimbabwe, where Josh interviews witnesses from one of the largest UFO sightings in modern history. Then, in England, he investigates the infamous case that has become known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Roswell Revealed
programme.desc: Josh's epic search for extraterrestrial life comes to a close in the USA, where a legendary investigation team brings him to a hot case in Arkansas. Then, he visits with a researcher who may have new information on the mother of all UFOs.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh Gates follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches for an iconic biblical relic.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh Gates journeys to the Holy Land to investigate the mystery of where Jesus Christ was actually born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Indiana Josh
programme.desc: Josh hosts a virtual 'Raiders of the Lost Ark' reunion with stars Karen Allen and John Rhys-Davies. Then, Josh attempts to master Indiana Jones' signature bullwhip, hopefully without injuring himself.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh Gates journeys to the Holy Land to investigate the mystery of where Jesus Christ was actually born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Indiana Josh
programme.desc: Josh hosts a virtual 'Raiders of the Lost Ark' reunion with stars Karen Allen and John Rhys-Davies. Then, Josh attempts to master Indiana Jones' signature bullwhip, hopefully without injuring himself.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Terror in Tanzania
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the African Serengeti to survive for 21 days with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Pain Forest
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to endure 21 days in the Malaysian rainforest. With relentless rainstorms, they will have to fight the elements with only their knowledge of the wilderness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Redemption Road
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. Starvation sets in causing tension to rise. They'll have to come together to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Lost World
programme.desc: In this special episode, two lucky fans are selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A single mom and an optimistic novice try to survive the wild coast of South Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, dropped on opposite ends of the remote Panamanian rainforest, eventually meet and must work together to conquer the Everest of extreme survival challenges.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Vianey and Allen's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 lbs. each, Vianey and Allen are locked in a codependent relationship based on a shared love of food. As they head to Houston, they will soon find out if their relationship can handle the strain of growing healthy together.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dottie and Cynthia
programme.desc: Dottie faces an unexpected challenge to her weight-loss when her husband's drinking problem becomes intolerable for her and her son. Cynthia starts to wonder if being there for her kids at her current weight is more important than losing more.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity, Charly and Teretha
programme.desc: In order to keep pace with her daughter Charly's impressive weight loss, Charity must do something she's never done: find a way to go it alone. Try as she might, Teretha finds one too many obstacles in the way of continuing with Dr Nowzaradan's program.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life and faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity, Charly and Teretha

programme.desc: Homeowners Jean and Sean make a tearful plea to design experts Nate and Jeremiah to help them not only fix a 16 year ongoing construction debacle, but also to make their home comfortable and safe enough so their infant grandson can finally come to visit.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah by Design: Home Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: The Covenant House is a youth homeless shelter in Hollywood, largely modern in design. 'The Big Room,' however, needs some work. Former and current residents ask Nate and Jeremiah to help transform 'The Big Room' into 'The Family Room.'

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Making Marital Moves
programme.desc: The family comes together to help prepare for Tori and Zack's wedding. Meanwhile, the youngest Roloff makes a big announcement.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: It's Not Easy Letting Go
programme.desc: Matt and Amy finally address the future of their marriage. Meanwhile, Amy takes on a DIY project with her friend Lisa to help embrace suddenly having an empty nest. Later, Zack asks Jeremy to play a very special role at his wedding.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The Johnstons are back with some big life events on the horizon. Trent seeks answers for his ongoing health issues, Liz re-enters the dating scene with Emma not too far behind and Anna is unsure about leaving home after graduation.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Weedwhackers

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Old Men and The Lake
programme.desc: During a routine boat patrol on the sound the officers rush to save a pair of elderly boaters who have been thrown overboard. Another officer has a run-in with an aggressive prospector hunting for gold.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Baiters Beware
programme.desc: Fair chase is the gold standard of hunting, and in Maine, it's the law. Sgt. Simmons and Warden McKenney pursue a pair of brothers with bait piles. Warden Carter hunts for a father who may be teaching his son to poach. Warden Cross snares a trap thief.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Run
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Hannett pursues an unusual recreational vehicle in a high speed chase. Officer Pushee and Trainee Driscoll encounter a group of combative speedsters and Officer Lucas races to the scene of an ATV crash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Caught in a Lie
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne respond to an ATV accident on a mountain summit in the middle of the night. Officer McKee attempts to reunite an exotic pet with its owner. Sergeant Dakai confronts a hunter he suspects of illegally baiting bears.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose on the Loose
programme.desc: Teams use helicopters to radio-collar moose. The wardens rescue two skiers lost in the backcountry. A drunk sledder is caught and blames his nephew. A warden extinguishes a barn fire. A man with outstanding poaching warrants is arrested.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Racking Up the Bad Guys
programme.desc: During moose season in Maine, sometimes family tradition involves breaking the law. Sergeant Simmons investigates a murdered mother deer, while Warden Curtis and canine Cruizer search the backwoods of Downeast by moonlight to find a missing hunter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose Mania
programme.desc: The Warden Service kicks into high gear as they search for poachers and crack down on dangerous activity with firearms.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Off Roadin'
programme.desc: Two teams of Wardens join forces to bust ATV scofflaws and end up in a dramatic high-speed chase.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Baiters Beware
programme.desc: Fair chase is the gold standard of hunting, and in Maine, it's the law. Sgt. Simmons and Warden McKenney pursue a pair of brothers with bait piles. Warden Carter hunts for a father who may be teaching his son to poach. Warden Cross snares a trap thief.

programme.title: Dogs 101: Ugly Dogs
programme.desc: Meet dogs that are so ugly, they're cute. And, find out this year's winner of the World's Ugliest Dog Contest.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: One of Our Own

programme.title: See No Evil: Far From Home

programme.desc: When a law enforcement officer is gunned down in cold blood, detectives will stop at nothing to seek justice for one of their own. There are no witnesses to the crime, leading investigators to surveillance cameras for answers.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: After 32-year-old Mark Mueller's body is pulled from the shore of Lake Michigan, police wonder how his favorite fishing spot became a scene for murder. It's not until his burned-out car is found miles away that officers finally get some answers.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Misty River
programme.desc: In the marshy waters of Florida's Indian River, a local judge makes a grisly discovery: the body of a young woman, bound and floating in the water. Now police are searching for the person who brought 22-year-old Misty Morse to her watery grave.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death
programme.desc: After a wild Christmas party, Ed Amos wakes to find his wife, Bobbe dead from an apparent cocaine overdose. When her toxicology report suggests foul play, detectives dig into their pasts to uncover greed, secret love affairs, and suspicious deaths.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Hate and Fury
programme.desc: When three synagogues simultaneously go up in flames, federal agents work around the clock to solve the arsons. They get an unexpected break when a double murder 150 miles away reveals new evidence - and a sinister plot of bigotry, fire and fury.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In El Dorado County, CA, firefighters combatting a raging fire discover a burnt out SUV with the charred remains of a beloved local man reported missing just hours earlier, igniting an investigation into a sinister scheme, and exposing a deadly affair.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Executioner
programme.desc: When a boat distributor reports a potential yacht theft in Oakland, California, local detectives are called to investigate. A sting operation ensnares a master manipulator with an unexpected day job and a voracious appetite for money and murder.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths behind extraterrestrial spacecraft and we learn the truth of two pioneering flights.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fire In the Sky

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: All American
programme.desc: Some of the best know Food Network stars talk about their favourite American dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Messy
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern, Duff, Alton Brown and others share what they say are delicious, gooey, sloppy and best of all... MESSY.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Los Angeles, California, is the capital of stardom, and that includes its cuisine. In a city known for such edible icons as Korean tacos and the L.A. street dog, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hong Kong
programme.desc: The city of Hong Kong's seven million residents flock to its many restaurants, street carts, and noodle houses daily. From dim sum to congee to roast goose, Andrew Zimmern finds out just what makes this destination so delicious!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Monstrous Truck/ Minnie's Vacation Home!
programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Armadylan Action Hero/Super Muscles Show Off
programme.desc: Ninja uses Armadylan's dream of becoming a kung fu movie star to break into a museum. While Gekko and Armadylan guard the city, their watch turns into a contest of who's strongest!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Kermit's Big Show / The Card Shark
programme.desc: The Muppets put on a show for Miss Nanny but Kermit's directing style is too strict. After Piggy keeps cheating at a board game, Rizzo gives her a run for her money.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Across the Universe/ Brit's Picks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences; Brittany's furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.desc: A 1940s Jackie Robinson All-Stars scorecard begins our quest for information about early baseball's role in diversifying the country. A contributor believes that their basket was made by Toby Riddle. We investigate why Hoover endorsed a crime radio drama.

programme.title: Nova: Polar Extremes

programme.title: Nova: Why Bridges Collapse
programme.desc: Experts compare what happened to the Polcevera with other deadly bridge collapses, including Minnesota's I-35W bridge over the Mississippi and the famed Silver Bridge over the Ohio River.

programme.title: The Amazing Human Body: Survive

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Dinah Jane - VMA
programme.desc: Nick Cannon and Dinah Jane battle it out in a VMA Themed episode with games: Eat That Ass Up, Got Props, Thanks for Nothing and the Wildstyle battle. Dinah Jane performs, Heard It All Before.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Tee Grizzley
programme.desc: Nick Cannon challenges Tee Grizzley with a bunch of different games, including Flow Job, Got Props, Wild Sauce and the Wildstyle battle.

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place
programme.desc: Cole's new girlfriend Shanise forces him to move into his own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Scrooge
programme.desc: Martin is visited by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating
programme.desc: After Martin promises to spend more time with Gina, he ends up on jury duty with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1
programme.desc: Everyone goes on a cruise, except Gina who accidentally missed it. Martin meets a beautiful woman named Ellen who he thinks is depressed, and Tommy and Pam try to be friends.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much
programme.desc: Martin helps a burglar rob his apartment because he thinks it's part of a prank by Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't That About a Ditch
programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Martin: I, Martin, Take Thee Pam?
programme.desc: Martin discovers that his marriage is invalid and that he's actually married to Pam.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Ol' Ball and Chain
programme.desc: On the day of Jazz's wedding, his bride-to-be makes sexual advances towards Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Will is stranded in a mountain forest with his new girlfriend's disagreeable father.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: M Is for the Many Things She Gave Me
programme.desc: When Philip's former college girlfriend comes to visit, she attempts to seduce Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mother's Day
programme.desc: When Jazz and his wife try unsuccessfully to become pregnant, they ask for Will's help.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Papa's Got a Brand New Excuse
programme.desc: Philip and Vivian are unable to forgive Will's father for abandoning Will and his mother.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: For Sale by Owner
programme.desc: The Banks family is offered a large sum of money by a client who wants to buy their house.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: While vacationing in Will's hometown, the Banks family learns a secret about Will.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Shore
programme.desc: A successful and driven single mom plans a working vacation to her parents where she and her kids encounter the next door neighbour, a confident devil-may-care surfer.

programme.title: Movie: Winter Castle
programme.desc: A maid of honour and the best man of the wedding take place in an ice hotel share an instant and sudden connection.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Impotence of Being Ernest
programme.desc: Rose is crazy about her new beau, Ernie, but learns that he is impotent, so she helps him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Me Tender
programme.desc: When Sophia sets Dorothy up on a blind date, Dorothy secretly falls for the seemingly simple man, claiming 'he's the greatest lover she ever had'. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose join 'Be a Pal'.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: The girls' dates all cancel on them, leaving them to reflect on past experiences.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Two Rode Together
programme.desc: Dorothy wants some quality time with Sophia while Rose and Blanche start a storybook.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: You Gotta Have Hope
programme.desc: Dorothy has little success lining up talent for a ladies' auxiliary variety benefit show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Fiddler on the Ropes
programme.desc: Sophia meets a fight manager and buys a controlling interest in boxer 'Kid Pepe.'

programme.title: Frasier: A Word to the Wiseguy
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles ask a local hoodlum to solve the problem of Maris's 102 unpaid parking tickets. In return, however, Jerome asks Frasier to tell his fiancée to agree to marry him.

programme.title: Frasier: Look Before You Leap
programme.desc: On Leap Day, Frasier encourages everyone to use their bonus day to do something special. For his 'leap,' Frasier decides to sing an aria instead of his usual song at a benefit, and tries to stop Niles from pursuing Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: High Crane Drifter
programme.desc: A stressed Frasier resorts to physical force with a rude patron, which ends up being detailed in the local newspaper. He is hailed as a hero, but soon comes to regret it when the man decides to sue Frasier for assault.

programme.title: Frasier: Chess Pains
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with chess after Martin defeats him over and over again.

programme.title: Frasier: Crane vs. Crane
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier face off when they take opposite sides in a courtroom hearing over the issue of an elderly man's sanity. Niles believes he is crazy, but Frasier interprets the man's quirks as eccentricities.

programme.title: Frasier: Police Story
programme.desc: Frasier becomes enamoured with a traffic cop after she pulls him over for speeding.

programme.title: Frasier: Where There's Smoke There's Fired
programme.desc: The station owner's new manager, millionaire Big Willy, asks Frasier to get his fiancée to stop smoking. Frasier agrees, until he discovers that the fiancée is his agent, Bebe.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Séance
programme.desc: Lucy is suddenly interested in astrology and uses it to advise Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Men Are Messy
programme.desc: When a reporter comes over to do a feature on the Ricardos, Lucy trashes the apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Fur Coat
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a mink coat that is to be used in his act but Lucy thinks it's for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Is Jealous of Girl Singer
programme.desc: Lucy dons a disguise to catch Ricky with another girl at the Tropicana.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Till Death Do We Volley
programme.desc: Dorothy and her 'best friend' from high school take their rivalry to the tennis court.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Rose is addicted to prescription drugs; Sophia is approached to do a pizza commercial.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Little Sister
programme.desc: Rose's younger sister Holly comes to visit and charms Dorothy, Blanche and Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Choice
programme.desc: Sophia kidnaps her friend after she is moved into a minimum standards nursing home.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rites of Spring
programme.desc: The housemates decide that it is time to diet seriously.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Foreign Exchange
programme.desc: Sophia's friends arrive from Sicily, claiming that their real bambina is Dorothy.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Chris McNally from the Hallmark Channel series 'When Calls the Heart' stops by. Actress Kellie Martin talks about the Hallmark Movies & Mysteries original, 'Hailey Dean Mysteries: Killer Sentence.'

programme.title: Movie: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A woman shows her dog in a fancy New York dog show and the judge comes off as rude and aristocratic. A chain of misunderstanding unfolds during the competition, complicating the attraction they have for one another.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine. But first, she has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: Movie: Very, Very, Valentine
programme.desc: A kind hearted and shy florist meets the perfect man at a Valentine's Masquerade Ball. She enlists the help of her best friend to track him down, only to find that her perfect man may already be in front of her.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 13, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: Workaholics: Fry Guys
programme.desc: The guys try to get Alice laid so they can have an office fish fry.

programme.title: Workaholics: Flashback in the Day
programme.desc: The story of how Adam, Blake and Ders first met.

programme.title: Workaholics: Straight Up Juggahos
programme.desc: To prevent Jillian from coming to an important business function, the guys send her on a blind date. It backfires when they have to rescue her from an Insane Clown Posse concert.

programme.title: Workaholics: To Friend a Predator
programme.desc: When the guys try 'To Catch a Predator', a local child molester, he turns out to be the coolest guy they ever met.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 14, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Jimbo and Ned's efforts to drive up the ratings for their new hunting show on the cable access channel threatens to edge out an old favourite, 'Jesus and Pals.'

programme.title: South Park: The Tooth Fairy's Tats 2000
programme.desc: When Cartman discovers the Tooth Fairy is paying a premium price for lost teeth, he and the boys seize the opportunity to make some cash.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 14, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: The Magic Bush
programme.desc: Cartman and Butters get their hands on a drone and take it for a spin around the neighbourhood.

programme.title: South Park: You're Getting Old

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: Go Fund Yourself
programme.desc: The boys name their new start-up company 'The Washington Redskins.'

programme.title: South Park: Informative Murder Porn
programme.desc: The boys use the game of 'Minecraft' as a distraction to keep their parents from hurting each other.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Harvey-Woodruff Family
programme.desc: Meet the Harvey-Woodruff's, our newest Military Makeover family of Lincolnton, North Carolina.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Altar Ego
programme.desc: Doug and the guys take a trip to try and stop Spence's ex-girlfriend from getting married.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Icky Shuffle
programme.desc: Doug agrees to team-up with Arthur for the senior centre's shuffleboard tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awful Bigamy
programme.desc: Doug is reluctant to let Holly move in with them after she gets kicked out of her place.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Lost Vegas
programme.desc: Doug's plans to earn brownie points by taking Carrie to a spa lands him in hot water.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dugan Groupie
programme.desc: Doug gets jealous when Carrie enjoys her work so much that she even works on Saturdays.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Furious Gorge
programme.desc: When Carrie insists that Doug join an overeaters support group, he secretly opts out.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Entertainment Weakly
programme.desc: Doug is forced to work on his impersonation skills when he loses his lunchtime audience.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Name Dropper
programme.desc: When Doug forgets the name of one of Carrie's co-workers, he opts to fake a heart attack.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Off-Track Bedding
programme.desc: Doug is forced to track down his father at a convention to discuss his parents' marriage.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Silent Mite
programme.desc: Doug is convinced that a 'little person' stole his wallet while he was out shopping.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awed Couple
programme.desc: When Deacon and Kelly find new friends, Doug and Carrie must turn to their old friends.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cologne Ranger
programme.desc: Doug senses his manhood slipping away when Carrie forbids him to wear his new cologne.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Doug is unhappy with Carrie's choice for a housekeeper so he hires Spence's mom, Veronica.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pour Judgment
programme.desc: Doug enrols in a bartending school and gets a job working at a local bar.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gym Neighbors
programme.desc: When Carrie puts on a couple of pounds, Doug persuades her to start weight training.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gorilla Warfare
programme.desc: Doug is forced to come up with an original romantic phrase to use on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi, School
programme.desc: Doug can't get enough of reliving his glory days when he runs into his ex-football coach.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deconstructing Carrie
programme.desc: As Carrie approaches her 35th birthday, Doug bribes construction workers to hoot at her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, dropped on opposite ends of the remote Panamanian rainforest, eventually meet and must work together to conquer the Everest of extreme survival challenges.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blindsided
programme.desc: A dangerous burn and clashing survival strategies plague survivalists Angela and Steven in the jungles of Panama.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Meltdown on the Mountain
programme.desc: In a high-altitude jungle in Colombia, Tommy and Leah face territorial Pumas and venomous fer-de-lance snakes. Their biggest threat is the extreme temperature changes, with highs near 100 and lows in the 40s.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks
programme.desc: Five 'Naked and Afraid' all-stars must survive 14 days in shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Twinning
programme.desc: In an unprecedented Naked and Afraid challenge, identical twin sisters Amber and Serena, as well as brothers Warren and Thomas, are dropped in the African savannah. They take on rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard stalking their camp.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Two Tarzans, One Jane
programme.desc: When a third survivalist is added to the mix, romantic complications make surviving the Colombian jungle's poisonous dart frogs and deadly jaguars much more complicated. Feeling left out, a survivalist's emotional breakdown puts his challenge at risk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: In Too Deep
programme.desc: On the edge of the Bermuda Triangle, an Army veteran dive master and a Cajun boat captain take on relentless thunderstorms and battle dehydration as they try navigate more than 20 miles of open ocean in the ultimate test of sink or swim.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Second Wind
programme.desc: The Bering Sea battle heats up as Shawn bets big on a new discovery he hopes will keep him ahead of Ken's massive dredge. The Kellys are forced to find new ground. Emily nearly boils a diver alive.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Every Ounce Counts
programme.desc: Shawn works overtime to cover for his exhausted crew. Kris is blindsided by the loss of his lead diver. Emily jumps in to prevent a fuel spill. Ken and George collaborate to find Myrtle a motherlode.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Closing the Gap
programme.desc: Winter winds force the captains to reevaluate risk and reward. Shawn's mega-barge extraction takes a turn for the worse. Ken pushes the Myrtle to the limit on a 5-day run. Emily sends her divers deeper. Kris invents a new form of prospecting.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Innovate and Overcome
programme.desc: In a race against winter, Shawn extends his sluice to get more gold; Ken pushes the Myrtle 24 hours a day; Emily tangles with the tide; Kris battles a bed of quartz and George enjoys a season-ending dive with his son.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: King of Nome
programme.desc: Desperate to be Nome's gold king, Shawn risks the Christine Rose in dangerous waters. Ken struggles to free the Myrtle from the harbour. Emily fights a fouled airline and Kris attempts one more dive at the Bluff.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Double Down
programme.desc: Despite the worst conditions in a decade, the miners hedge their bets as Shawn and Ken go head to head with their largest ships ever. Emily confronts the elements while Kris leads his family with a newfound determination.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Sound of Money
programme.desc: Vernon and his crew get stranded in the Yukon. Shawn finds a good luck charm in his son. Ken suffers a mechanical setback and Emily sends rookie diver Chase underwater.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Storm Ravaged
programme.desc: Whipping winds and crashing waves force the miners to ask themselves how hard they're willing to fight. Shawn channels his inner MacGyver to fix a stalled machine. Kris acts boldly. Vern must make a life or death decision.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Guts and Gravel
programme.desc: Before the winter freeze out, Shawn gambles to dig deeper than ever before as Ken brings the heat. The Kellys restart from scratch with a new dredge design. Emily aims to work nonstop.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Gold Blooded
programme.desc: To test mother nature's stamina, Shawn pushes the Christine Rose to its maximum work depth in the face of massive swells while Ken digs on an untouched, gold-rich dirt patch. Emily faces ripping currents and an exhausted diver. Vernon hits the open seas.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Missing in Action
