programme.title: Dogs 101: Puppies
programme.desc: Dogs 101 celebrates all things puppies. A step-by-step through everything you need to know about puppies; from their basic biology to selecting the right puppy for your lifestyle, and how to prepare your household for your new puppy's arrival.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Bird Barn Treehouse
programme.desc: Two retirees get a retreat on their 100-acre Wisconsin farm. Pete builds a barn-like birdhouse with three separate pods including an art studio, an office, and a lounge complete with a screened porch and a deck overlooking their stable of alpacas.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Grace VanderWaal's Got Treehouse
programme.desc: When Grace Vanderwaal, a singer, songwriter, and ukulele marvel who won America's Got Talent, said she wanted a "sick" treehouse Pete heard her loud and clear! He and his crew build not one, but TWO treehouses for the 13-year-old musical wonder.

programme.title: Tanked!: Roll With it

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Why We Go On

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blind Hope

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror

programme.title: The Parkers: Love Potion No. 83
programme.desc: Nikki tries to find an antidote when her daughter and friends try a Jamaican love potion.

programme.title: The Parkers: Somebody's Watching You
programme.desc: Nikki thinks she sees a murder while spying on the neighbours; Kim's design is stolen.

programme.title: Black-ish: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: The Johnson kids attempt to keep their emotions in check after an estranged Dre and Bow try 'nesting,' taking turns living in the family house separately to give each other space.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dream Home
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are living separate lives and switching off with the kids. They start to realize how much they relied on each other and how hard it is being on their own.

programme.title: Black-ish: Gap Year
programme.desc: After dropping Junior off at college, Dre and Bow are beside themselves when they find him back at home announcing his decision to take a gap year. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane begin to question whether they should still be sharing a room.

programme.title: Black-ish: Don't You Be My Neighbor
programme.desc: The neighbours decide to rent their house out for homestays and it’s causing problems for the Johnsons. Dre develops a newfound joy of calling the cops over petty neighbourhood issues but begins to question the example he is setting for Jack.

programme.title: Black-ish: Purple Rain
programme.desc: The family is shocked to learn that Jack and Diane are not familiar with the iconic music of Prince. One by one, each member of the family works to explain Prince’s tremendous impact on their lives through his music.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Grief
programme.desc: Bow's mom, Alicia, visits the family for the first time since the loss of Bow's dad, and she is still heavily grieving. Bow decides to throw a big luau-themed party for what would have been her dad's next birthday.

programme.title: Black-ish: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: The twins opt out of the family Halloween costume for fear it will hurt their social status in middle school. Dre and Bow take it upon themselves to protect them from bullies by putting together the best haunted house and invite the whole seventh grade.

programme.title: Black-ish: Friends Without Benefits
programme.desc: Bow makes a new friend at work and Dre thinks she has broken bird syndrome. Meanwhile, Junior transforms his shared room with Jack into a frat house and Ruby and Diane gang up against them.

programme.title: Black-ish: Christmas in Theater Eight
programme.desc: The Johnsons have a tradition of going to the movies on Christmas and they can never agree on what to see. Dre wants to see an important film about Rosa Parks, but they all want to see the latest action-packed superhero blockbuster.

programme.title: Black-ish: Stand Up, Fall Down
programme.desc: Junior hasn’t been doing much at home during his gap year, so Dre decides to put him to work as an intern.

programme.title: Movie: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: A police officer joins the Rest in Peace Department, a unit that is made up of undead police officers, and attempts to find the man who murdered him.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Movie: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: The government tracks down extreme athlete Xander Cage, long presumed dead, to fight a dangerous new foe. They must race to recover an unstoppable weapon known as Pandora's Box. Along with a new team, Xander takes on his most powerful foe yet.

programme.desc: Elida leaves the team to take a scav job while Isaac and Amae battle hijackers on board a train.

programme.title: Movie: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: A police officer joins the Rest in Peace Department, a unit that is made up of undead police officers, and attempts to find the man who murdered him.

programme.title: Movie: King Kong
programme.desc: An ambitious movie producer risks everything and takes a crew to a mysterious island, where they discover and capture a giant ape.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: To Serve Man
programme.desc: Giant Martians arrive on Earth and claim that they are good-natured and want to serve man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Rites of Jeff Myrtlebank
programme.desc: At his funeral, Jeff sits upright in his coffin and the townsfolk believe he's possessed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fugitive
programme.desc: An elderly man from another planet is pursued by another from his home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Evaluation Day
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a decapitated body in the desert. Warrick looks into a murder in a juvenile detention centre.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Strip Strangler
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind. With the investigation somewhat stalled, the sheriff invites the FBI to join the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Burked
programme.desc: Grissom and the crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener. After initially assuming the death was by overdose, further examination reveals that Braun had been restrained at some point.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university. A young woman vanished, seemingly off the face of the earth. Forensics leads them to possible suspects, and possible suspects all have probable motives, but nothing pans out.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site. Against the wishes of the Sheriff, Grissom pushes to get at the truth of the matter. Meanwhile, Nick and Catherine take on a case with little more than angora fibres to follow.

programme.title: Movie: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-con receives a call from his estranged daughter asking for help. She has become the target of a deadly group of Mexican drug dealers. Returning to a life he thought he left behind, he uses his old skills and contacts to keep his daughter safe.

programme.title: Movie: King Kong
programme.desc: An ambitious movie producer risks everything and takes a crew to a mysterious island, where they discover and capture a giant ape.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Fire Sale Fail to Dream Duplex
programme.desc: While looking for a property in Wicker Park, Alison and Donovan discover what seems like a great deal on an 1885 triplex with fire damage. Even as they start picking out pieces for it, hidden structural damage from the fire starts burning up profits.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Alison Victoria wants to give a neglected Bucktown home an upscale, English-style makeover. However, she faces a tough financial decision when a potential buyer makes a full-price offer that requires her to change the entire design.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Lincoln Park Fourplex
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan decide to renovate a 1900s two-flat home in Lincoln Square and convert it back into a single-family home. However, when they decide to sell to a pre-buyer, every decision leads to additional expenses and delays.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Deceiving Deal
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina see a great opportunity to purchase a three-bedroom house in Whittier, California, for a low price since the seller is looking to unload it quickly and it is still tenant-occupied.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Buyer's Remorse
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a Yorba Linda, CA, home. They spend big money to remove a fireplace, but when Tarek goes behind Christina's back and changes a tile design, she tackles the new fireplace herself.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Horrible Hoarder House
programme.desc: Alison and Mondo are amateur flippers who have not only taken on the worst house on the block, but the worst house Tarek has ever seen.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: House Hunters: Time's Up in Boston
programme.desc: A buyer in the Boston area has been living with her parents for four years to save for a place. Everyone's eager for her to get out on her own, but her dad's fixation with the safety of these old New England properties is slowing them down.

programme.desc: Most people think of the Maldives as a place of thriving luxury resorts, so when the chance to work for one comes up, a Dubai couple sees it as an opportunity for their growing family. With a baby on the way, the adjustment might be more than expected.

programme.desc: A couple and their daughter move back to his hometown of Lafayette, Louisiana, and they're having trouble agreeing on a home. One is eager for a house with vintage character close to the city, while the other wants something move-in ready.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a Yorba Linda, CA, home. They spend big money to remove a fireplace, but when Tarek goes behind Christina's back and changes a tile design, she tackles the new fireplace herself.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Flip With the Enemy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are busier than ever with their growing business. As a result, when a fellow flipper contacts them about partnering on a house and he wants to split the time, money and profit 50/50, they are very interested.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a clean house in good shape that is aggressively priced in comparison to comparable properties in the area. But the reality of a dream listing doesn't always live up to the hype so they head over to check out the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Lot Little Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a new listing in Buena Park, California that's small and run down but sits on a very large lot, offering possibilities for added value and increased profit.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Expanding the Family in Mississippi
programme.desc: A couple with two young kids are in the process of growing their family through adoption. They both grew up near Mississippi's Barnett Reservoir and want to find a home with more space while fulfilling their lifelong dream of living on the water.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Ideal Vacation Spot
programme.desc: After visiting the Lake of the Ozarks in Missouri, a family that fell in love with the area hopes to find a vacation retreat along its winding shores.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Looking to Dock
programme.desc: A Texas couple with two kids loves getting out on the water and are ready to find a place to dock their boat. They both grew up around lakes and want to find a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, where their kids can share those same memories.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Searching for a Secluded Cove
programme.desc: A couple has been visiting friends on Sweetwater Lake, Indiana, with their two daughters for years. Now that the girls are older, the family is ready to purchase a vacation home of their own to enjoy all the lake has to offer.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Racing to Relocate
programme.desc: A couple relocates to Tennessee for his job and decides to live out their dreams of owning a lake home along the welcoming shores of Cherokee Lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Lakeside Michigan Retreat
programme.desc: Newlyweds leave city life behind to start a family along one of southeast Michigan's serene lakes. Their current home isn't big enough for a family expansion so they're hoping to find the perfect lakeside retreat.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Fresh Start on Lake Kampeska

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Brainerd Lakes Cabin
programme.desc: A family that frequents the Brainerd Lakes area of Minnesota has a dream of owning a cabin in this serene location.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Continuing the Family Tradition
programme.desc: Two siblings look for a waterfront vacation home on Long Lake, Wisconsin, so they can give their kids the same great memories they had growing up.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Fit For the Family on Lake Norman, NC
programme.desc: A Utah couple that attended college in North Carolina and has dreamed of moving back, packs up their family and heads to Lake Norman. The challenge, however, is finding a house in their price range that's big enough to accommodate everyone.

programme.title: Good Bones: Poltergeist Property

programme.title: Good Bones: Flooded Two-Story Restored

programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: Yellowstone freezes solid for six months each year. The severe winter is the greatest challenge facing the Park's animals, but for the wolf, it is the season of opportunity as they stalk ever-weakening prey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn is Yellowstone's shortest season and a period of swift change. Conditions change from summer to winter in just two months, forcing animals to leave or prepare for winter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Best of Blue Planet II

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Dark Page

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Attached

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Force of Nature

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Inheritance

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bears on a Plane
programme.desc: Two bear cubs need Dr. Oakley’s help as they embark on a long journey to a new home.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Beginner's Yuck
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic veterans take a new vet, Dr. Erin, under their wing, as they flip cows, clamp calves, tube horses, and treat a rescue rooster with an injured foot.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Return of Dr. Strangeglove

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Paw and Order

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: US Navy vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Evidence from a top-secret file reveals the unsolved mystery of an American aircraft carrier's strange encounter with a UFO, and a team of experts use the latest tech and a vital eyewitness to investigate the true story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Forbidden Wall
programme.desc: The ruins of a great wall that once marked the edge of the world hold the secrets of the ancient soldiers who stood watch here long ago. New discoveries reveal who the wall was meant to keep out and why the site is littered with skulls.

programme.desc: A look at how things work, and some of the most amazing examples of everyday objects.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?: Steel, Wool, Kiteboards

programme.title: How Do They Do It?: Racing Bikes, Stunt Pilots, Oil Well
programme.desc: A look at racing bikes, stunt pilots and oil well.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?: Power Tunnel, Pizza Ovens and Playhouses
programme.desc: This episode features power tunnel, pizza ovens and playhouses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations
programme.desc: Algonso gets a sweet sensation from treats like the iconic Sugar Daddy, colorful Warheads Chewy Cubes, and the luscious Milk Chocolate with Caramel Squares from Ghirardelli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Love is in the Air
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro gets the lowdown on the sweet messages imprinted on Necco's classic Sweet Hearts and how the Perfect Bite packs so much flavor into their Caramelized Onion and Feta Pastry Kisses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The secrets behind Necco's Slapstix lollipops and Long Grove Confectionary's Toffee.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores layer after layer of flavor when he gets the inside scoop on Tootsie's Caramel Apple Pops, Bissinger's Coconut Caramel Chocolate Bar and Tastykake's Cherry Sweet Rolls.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Barbecue Sides
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro puts together the perfect backyard barbecue, including Mrs. Freshley's melt-in-your-mouth cupcakes, Mrs. Fisher's perfectly-salted rippled chips, and Mayfield Dairy's creamy banana split ice cream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: How It's Made: Oil Lamps, Chocolate Mints, Underfloor Heating, Pillows
programme.desc: See how oil lamps, chocolate mints, under floor heating and pillows are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Cast Iron Stoves; Ultralight Aircraft; Snow Groomers; Rubber Bands
programme.desc: Find out how cast iron stoves, ultra-light aircraft, snow groomers and rubber bands are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Rally Cars, Pork Pies, Floating Fountains, Artificial Stone Ornaments
programme.desc: This episode features rally cars, pork pies, floating fountains and artificial stone ornaments.

programme.title: How It's Made: Impact Wrenches, Marble Sinks, Plantain Chips, NASCAR Stock Cars
programme.desc: Learn how pneumatic impact wrenches, cultured marble sinks, plantain chips, and NASCAR stock cars are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Corn Tortillas, Crankshafts & Camsafts, Bush Planes, Aluminum Bike Wheels
programme.desc: Find out how corn tortillas, crankshafts, camshafts, bush planes, and aluminum bike wheels are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Javelins, Cuckoo Clocks, Hearts of Palm and Windshield Wipers
programme.desc: Find out how javelins, cuckoo clocks, hearts of palm, and windshield wipers are made.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History
programme.desc: As a boy, Travis Spencer always told himself that the cruel pranks his older brother, Timothy, played on him were ultimately harmless. He never suspected that his brother was using him to practice methods of torture that would be used on others.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop, Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: An Ohio mother is brutally murdered. A detective pursues the wrong suspects, while the real killer walked free. It would take a dedicated sheriff to find a real suspect.

programme.title: Predator at Large: He's Gonna Do It to Your Daughter
programme.desc: The peace of Raynham, Massachussets is forever shattered when cheerleader Mary Lou Arruda goes missing two days after her 15th birthday. The vast search effort to find her ends nine weeks later in the Freetown Forest, with a chilling discovery.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop, Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: An Ohio mother is brutally murdered. A detective pursues the wrong suspects, while the real killer walked free. It would take a dedicated sheriff to find a real suspect.

programme.title: Predator at Large: He's Gonna Do It to Your Daughter
programme.desc: The peace of Raynham, Massachussets is forever shattered when cheerleader Mary Lou Arruda goes missing two days after her 15th birthday. The vast search effort to find her ends nine weeks later in the Freetown Forest, with a chilling discovery.

programme.title: American Monster: Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Todd and Rachel Winkler's life looks exquisite from the outside, but inside things are falling apart. Seen on video, their happy marriage hides the terrible secrets and mind-games that can only lead to one conclusion.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: In the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia, a pregnant mother and her fiancé are kidnapped on the night before their baby shower. When the fiancé's family receives ransom calls shortly after, there's no mistake that the couple's lives are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder Down Memory Lane
programme.desc: When a 5-year old describes her mother's killer as a 'ninja' police determine the truth about the child's description as they put the surprising killer behind bars.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Final Lesson
programme.desc: The killer of a Santa Monica art teacher remains at large for years as police use every trick in their arsenal to finally hunt him down.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Vicious Voyeur
programme.desc: The killer of a young North Carolina woman keeps police guessing until he slips up and detectives get what they need to put him behind bars.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Absent Teacher
programme.desc: In 1993, an elementary school teacher goes missing after her first day at a new job. Over the next two months, investigators sift through clues, piecing together the heartbreaking truth behind the young educator's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Barefoot Homicide
programme.desc: After an all-night study session in a university lab, math student Deborah Wilson is found strangled, missing her shoes and socks. Years later, Philadelphia investigators unearth the shocking obsession that drove a killer to take her life.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: An Eye for Murder
programme.desc: In December of 1990, young Navy wife and mother Dina Kichler is found brutalized and strangled in her Mayport, Florida apartment. Investigators work through a list of the victim's admirers before closing in on the killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Dance
programme.desc: When a 16 year-old ballet dancer is assaulted and murdered in her home, Portsmouth, Virginia detectives mine dark family secrets and high school social circles to bring an obsessed killer to justice.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Officer Down
programme.desc: Officers find themselves pitted against a lone gunman holed up in a suburban home; the nerve of a rookie cop is tested when a routine stop on the highway goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Body Cam: Up Against the Clock
programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate

programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Bling by the Bay
programme.desc: A Florida family recruits the kings to design a sleek, modern pool for their oceanfront home on Tampa Bay. The crew creates an over-the-top pool with a vanishing edge spa and a roman soaking tub that's adorned with LED lighting and fire bowls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Modern Party Pad
programme.desc: The team transforms a barren patio space into a modern hangout. What was once a deck and dirt landscape gets a modified shade structure, steel water feature, living wall and bocce court. We add green plants and a metal fire feature to create a party pad.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck For Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Smart Home
programme.desc: Tiffany Brooks and Jason Pickens offer a behind-the-build tour of HGTV Smart Home 2020 in the leafy suburb of Wexford, Pennsylvania. See how this design-build duo collaborates on the high-tech Craftsman home with industrial touches and a modern flair.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Back to the Beach on the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach house in Ventnor City, New Jersey, where they can make memories with their daughter on the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Full-on Fixer-Upper in St. Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Through Renovations on North Padre Island, Texas
programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: From savory to sweet and cheesy to meaty, the pie possibilities are endless. Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: SoCal Sweets
programme.desc: We're coasting through Southern California to cool down with the hottest frozen treats. At Snow Monster in Long Beach, they offer sophisticated ice cream creations, like macaron ice cream sandwiches and drinks topped with clouds of cotton candy.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Twists on American Classics
programme.desc: The Doughnut Project in New York City offers savory-meets-sweet doughnuts, including a doughnut crossed with an everything bagel, and a chocolate cream doughnut flavored with bone marrow.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Morning Munchies
programme.desc: We're going on an ocean-hopping journey from Hawaii to the mainland for some magnificent morning munchies.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Next Level Sweets
programme.desc: We sample nine cutting-edge creations, including the coconut cremeaux at The Pig and the Lady in Honolulu: an edible fantasy landscape with creamy chocolate mountains.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Miami Sweets
programme.desc: We're in the sweet spot of the Sunshine State, Miami! The folks at The Salty Donut pride themselves on their buttery 24-hour brioche doughnut dough and have fun with topping combinations like key lime pie and peach bourbon.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sugar High
programme.desc: It's time for the ultimate sugar high. In Miami, Brain Freeze Nitrogen Ice Cream Lab is concocting delicious creations, and offering a mad scientist challenge to eat 30 scoops of ice cream in 30 minutes.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake and Cocktails
programme.desc: For extreme cake maker Nastassja Lusengo, the sky's the limit when it comes to her cake designs.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Bollywood-Inspired Wedding Cake

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Lady Liberty Cake
programme.desc: Sugar craft specialist Eloise Durrant receives an order for a four-foot-tall cake replica of the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Purr-Fect Birthday Cake
programme.desc: Extreme cake maker Molly Robbins is designing the purr-fect surprise for her best friend and cat lover, Liz.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Leprechaun and Mermaid Cakes
programme.desc: A giant leprechaun cake completes a St. Patrick's Day party while one bride's floral fairytale becomes a reality with 2,600 edible homemade flowers. Plus, savory dishes that look like anything but cake are stacked extra high.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Jaw-Dropping Fantasy Cakes
programme.desc: A baker takes on a cake of Jurassic proportions for a group of movie super fans, and a 30th birthday calls for an elaborate dessert that brings a woodland creature to life.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Massive Mega Cakes
programme.desc: A bride is speechless when her wedding cake starts to build on itself and then a mystical beast comes to life, complete with massive wings and sharp talons.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Realistic Animal Cakes
programme.desc: An unusual animal race has one baker building a cake like no other, and filigree details make a Chinese New Year celebration cake even more spectacular.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Big Time Rush
programme.desc: Four bakers fight for the change to serve cupcakes backstage for Big Time Rush.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Knockout

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Poetic Justice

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rogue Nation
programme.desc: While Pride remains on probation six weeks after his rogue takedown of the corrupt Mayor Hamilton, his team is closely monitored. Also, when the FBI arrives to run lead on a case involving a stolen rig of nuclear waste the team must investigate.

programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nangnangnangnang
programme.desc: Alan is shocked when Charlie's 25-year-old daughter shows up at Walden's beach house to connect with what's left of her family and who happens to like everything her dad liked, including women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think I Banged Lucille Ball
programme.desc: When Walden feels cramped in his own house, Jenny moves in with Evelyn and her boyfriend, Marty. Meanwhile, Alan becomes Lyndsey's 'other man.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit
programme.desc: Walden and Alan think it may be time for Berta to retire when she injures her back at work.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Clank, Clank, Drunken Skank
programme.desc: Walden starts partying with Jenny and her hot friends. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey’s illicit affair is jeopardized.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Movie: Gladiator
programme.desc: When a Roman Emperor's son usurps the throne, he leaves Roman general Maximus for dead and murders his family. Maximus seeks his revenge while forced to fight for his life as a gladiator.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: One-Queen Show
programme.desc: The queens must create and perform their own solo show. Whoopi Goldberg (The View; Ghost) coaches the queens and guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: Viva Drag Vegas
programme.desc: The queens must perform a medley of songs from 'RuPaul’s Drag Race Live!', a hit show on the Las Vegas strip. Choreographer Jamal Sims (Disney’s Aladdin) guest judges.

programme.title: Rupaul's Secret Celebrity Drag Race
programme.desc: RuPaul saves the best for last in this conclusion to the four part special event as three new celebrities step inside the workroom to form a fierce glam rock-inspired pop group sensation. Alyssa Edwards, Monique Heart and Vanessa Vangie Mateo guest star.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: Untucked!
programme.desc: The queens untuck and discuss what they've learned about themselves. It’s bittersweet as they reminisce on their final moments in the competition and consider the possibilities of what might lie ahead for them.

programme.title: Movie: Titanic
programme.desc: Two social opposites meet and fall in love while on Titanic's maiden voyage.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Movie: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Last-minute passenger additions shake things up on an airline's maiden flight.

programme.title: Movie: Very, Very, Valentine
programme.desc: A kind hearted and shy florist meets the perfect man at a Valentine's Masquerade Ball. She enlists the help of her best friend to track him down, only to find that her perfect man may already be in front of her.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Till Death Do We Volley
programme.desc: Dorothy and her 'best friend' from high school take their rivalry to the tennis court.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Rose is addicted to prescription drugs; Sophia is approached to do a pizza commercial.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Little Sister
programme.desc: Rose's younger sister Holly comes to visit and charms Dorothy, Blanche and Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Choice
programme.desc: Sophia kidnaps her friend after she is moved into a minimum standards nursing home.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rites of Spring
programme.desc: The housemates decide that it is time to diet seriously.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Foreign Exchange
programme.desc: Sophia's friends arrive from Sicily, claiming that their real bambina is Dorothy.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: To celebrate Frasier's third anniversary at the radio station, Roz gives Frasier a copy of his first broadcast. As he listens, Frasier remembers the events that occurred when he first arrived in Seattle and reunited with his family.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes
programme.desc: When Daphne's ex-fiancé comes to visit, she quickly introduces him to her 'new husband,' Niles. Martin stirs up trouble when he decides to introduce Roz as Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: Love Bites the Dog
programme.desc: Roz sets Frasier up with a gorgeous woman, who takes a shine to Bulldog instead. But when she dumps him, Bulldog becomes so distraught that Frasier has to take over his show. Meanwhile, Niles places an ad to attract more patients.

programme.title: Frasier: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles struggle to interpret Frasier's recurring dream, in which Frasier finds himself in bed with the radio station's restaurant critic.

programme.title: Frasier: A Crane's Critique
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are ecstatic when Martin becomes good friends with a reclusive author. Trouble ensues when they discover the author's new manuscript.

programme.title: Frasier: Head Games
programme.desc: Niles' brief session with a slumping basketball star turns the athlete's fortunes around. He is soon mortified to learn that the player believes his good luck is not due to Niles' advice, but to Niles' hair.

programme.title: Frasier: Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: When Daphne breaks up with her boyfriend, Niles feels ready to declare his feelings for her. Frasier convinces him it could be a mistake, until Daphne has an encounter with a Niles-like man at a singles bar.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: A young widowed father that has an adolescent son helps him navigate love and discovers he has a lot to learn himself.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: Movie: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A woman's mother is obsessed with her lack of love life and secretly sets her up with who she sees as the perfect man, but she just wants to run her restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Movie: June in January
programme.desc: Every January, June goes through post-holiday blues and Alex surprises her.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: Tosh.0: RC Car
programme.desc: A remote-controlled car's redemption gets a little fast and a little furious, the Tosh.0 staff eats people food, and Daniel converts to Scientology, the official religion of being a celebrity.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Car Jump Kid
programme.desc: Daniel plays in traffic with an amateur stunt boy, finds out if he's still the most talented member of his family, and shares some football gambling advice.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Pee Lady
programme.desc: Daniel goes way back to when he had the red and black lumberjack (with the hat to match) and introduces a new red-horse candidate to the Republican Party.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Men's Rights Lawyer
programme.desc: Daniel lawyers up with a feminist's worst nightmare, gets to know the gassiest lass in all the land and spices up sign language with some much-needed cussing.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tiamat the Dragon
programme.desc: Daniel frolics in the autumn mist with a magical dragon, reveals the true identity of the Pasadena Piper, and says goodbye to the worst prognosticator in all of sports.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Drone Wife Cheat
programme.desc: Daniel celebrates Valentine's Day with a drone pilot who caught his wife cheating, gets press credentials from the White House and proves that black recent history is just as important.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Spiritual Tasha Mama
programme.desc: Daniel samples an udder from another mother, lights a candle for female drivers and engages in intellectual discourse with the nation's finest colleges and universities.

programme.title: Tosh.0: One Hole or Two?
programme.desc: Daniel settles the most heated hole debate, talk about new that should be sweeping the nation, and presents the return of the most unsatisfying segment on TV.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Sneeze Guy
programme.desc: Daniel discovers the sexy side of sneezing, installs a state-of-the-art office security system that's 100% impenetrable and finds out whether British people's road rage is as bad as their comedy.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: Aloha Fluffy: Part 1
programme.desc: Gabriel is back with a special taped in beautiful Hawaii. Fluffy takes us into his crazy world of family and friends while talking about his world travels.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Kevin Nealon, Jimmy Kimmel and Paul Scheer
programme.desc: Terrence plans a gender reveal for DJ Khaled, Tim Heidecker and Eric Wareheim negotiate a "legally" fun time, and Heidi Gardner practices condescending philanthropy.

programme.title: South Park: Britney's New Look
programme.desc: When the boys help Britney Spears get to the North Pole, they discover the shocking secret behind her popularity.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The children of South Park are drawn to 'Mr. Jefferson,' the new neighbour in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get 'Mr. Jefferson' to love him best.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!
programme.desc: Once again Mrs. Garrison gets dumped. But this time she takes it out on the class. When the bar Mrs. Garrison finds solace in is about to be taken over by Persian club owners, she fights to save the one place that lets her be the woman she is.

programme.title: South Park: Prehistoric Ice Man
programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Fun With Veal
programme.desc: Stan is appalled when he realizes the veal he's been eating is, in fact, the meat from little baby calves. He goes to great lengths to rescue calves from the slaughterhouse, and a standoff with the Park County Police Department ensues.

programme.desc: The Parks gang completes one last task together, before saying goodbye to Pawnee.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: One Last Ride
programme.desc: The Parks gang completes one last task together, before saying goodbye to Pawnee.

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Movie: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In an attempt to win back his girlfriend, Sonny becomes a foster parent to Julian, a child his friend Kevin never knew he had. As the most unlikely parent, Sonny begins to learn what responsibility as an adult truly is.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: A small-town pizzeria owner unexpectedly inherits a vast fortune from a distant relative.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Black List
programme.desc: When Deacon starts hanging out with James, Doug is convinced he is being replaced.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wish Boned
programme.desc: Doug is ecstatic when he wins two tickets to the NCAA Final Four basketball tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Van Go
programme.desc: Holly discovers that Carrie used her for her van; Doug argues with a feisty waitress.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ice Cubed
programme.desc: Guilt gets the better of Carrie when she seeks refuge from a blizzard in a church.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Catching Hell
programme.desc: While at a Mets game, Doug spills mayonnaise on one of Carrie's most important clients.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Carrie is upset with Doug when she learns that a free TV was the reason for their getaway.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buy Curious
programme.desc: When their neighbour dies, Carrie decides it's time for them to enter the real estate game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: Movie: Boyfriend Killer
programme.desc: When her son dies, a woman discovers that her son's vindictive ex-girlfriend may have killed him.

programme.title: Movie: Unwanted Guest
programme.desc: When Amy has nowhere to go for winter break, her friend Christine insists she come stay with her family. What begins as a dream situation turns into a nightmare when Amy starts to obsess and wreak havoc on her welcoming hosts.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Escort
programme.desc: A single mother who isn't ready to date hires an escort to pose as her boyfriend at a work event. But it soon becomes evident that she hired a pathological liar with a disturbing dark past, who has no intention of leaving her.

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Secret Wife
programme.desc: A newly married woman finds out that her husband has another wife. Devastated, she decides the only decent thing to do is inform the other wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
