programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Correy Bell makes tumbling down the stairs look sexy, and Dave Helem has a message for substitute teachers. Plus, Pretty Ricki puts the 'C'' in crazy' and Dave Temple has a church experience he'll never forget.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hacktender
programme.desc: Kevin reveals a gas mask hack that will help you during a zombie apocalypse. Then, Brooke and Kevin test the BBQ starter hack from 'Home Alone,' and they try a hack that will get you extra sleep in the morning.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hacks by the Poolside
programme.desc: Brooke and Keving go head-to-head testing out hacks to make your pool party the event of the year. Then, they put a bug-saving hack to the test, and Kevin steps into a wrestling ring to learn some confidence-boosting hacks.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack to the Future
programme.desc: Lazy cook Brooke hacks edible shot glasses for your next house party. Kevin and Brooke find out if they can use the office coffee machine to hack their breakfast. Plus, learn about better ways to cope with some emotional hacks from the future.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Reverse Hackology
programme.desc: Brooke hacks an ex's pair of jeans into a drink coaster. Kevin learns a cool hack to get a dent out of a car. Plus, Kevin and Brooke learn some home exercise hacks from 'Good Housekeeping and Kevin judges a granny hack battle.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.desc: On the streets of New York, unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves in the middle of a TV game show. They can either win money by answering a series of fun questions correctly, or they can answer three questions wrong and be sent out on the street.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: On the streets of New York, unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves in the middle of a TV game show. They can either win money by answering a series of fun questions correctly, or they can answer three questions wrong and be sent out on the street.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: On the streets of New York, unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves in the middle of a TV game show. They can either win money by answering a series of fun questions correctly, or they can answer three questions wrong and be sent out on the street.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: Movie: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: A shy aspiring songwriter comes out of her shell while working at a popular New York bar.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Bowlful of Soul
programme.desc: In Charlotte, N.C., a down-home hangout dishes out low country favourites, like killer collard greens and standout shrimp and grits. In Las Vegas, a strip mall spot serves up both savoury and sweet crepe specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Meat
programme.desc: Guy's digging into a meat lover's paradise. In Colorado Springs, a Jamaican joint dishes out killer curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, a funky beer bar serves up wild boar sliders and outrageous pork belly mac and cheese fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Hand and By Fork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into dynamite dishes and grabbin' some outrageous grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Beach Sizzle
programme.desc: Guy hits spots in South Beach, Florida like a taqueria and a German restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chew and Brew
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' some grub cooked up at pubs! In Minneapolis, a big-time brewery cooking up dishes like righteous pulled pork and a killer brisket sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing everything from brunch to burgers! In Louisville, Ky., a breakfast-lunch spot crankin' out southern comfort, like lamb grits and fried bologna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Say That Again
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits three joints with the same name twice, such as Pok Pok, Tap Tap and Niko Nikos. He visits an old gas station in Houston, a Haitian restaurant in Miami Beach and a walk-up or dine-in place in Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Burger, a Bowl and a Slice
programme.desc: In this episode, burgers are done every which way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Kitchen
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out some righteous spots that say a lot in the name. In Fort Collins, Colo., an NFL pro and Triple-D alum team up on gangster green chili and mile-high burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting an authentic taste of all ends of the earth. In Bakersfield, Calif., the firehouse-turned-restaurant firing up Latin-fusion favorites like basque lamb tacos and popcorn pork with a side of zing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Fast Food
programme.desc: Guy tracks down some great places that prove fast food can also be great food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grabbin' a Sandwich
programme.desc: Guy heads to Salt Lake City and samples meatball subs and Philly cheese steaks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Taste of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down international dishes done Triple-D style: A combination Jamaican/Chinese joint in Florida; Home made Polish pierogi at a basic bar in Pittsburgh; and a Mexican restaurant in Utah where the specialty is seven kinds of mole.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Crepes to Kreplach
programme.desc: Guy finds a crepe joint stacking them 21-high in a butter rum caramel cake, and then a deli cooking stuffed cabbage and kreplach.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Return to Route 66
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes an eastward tour of Route 66. In Flagstaff, Ariz., a family style restaurant serves scratch-made southwest favourites. In Chicago, a joint has been serving fried chicken on Route 66 since the 30s.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Rustic Greek

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer in a Snap

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Fast Food With Lauren Alaina

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Fan Feedback

programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood enjoys her annual escape to the South Beach Wine and Food Festival in Florida, where she hosts events. To share this taste of summer, Trisha invites friends over for a South Beach-inspired meal.

programme.title: River Monsters: Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian outback to try and catch the rare but fearsome freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy hopes to reel in a rare river monster that's become legendary.

programme.title: River Monsters: Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade returns to the remote rivers of India's Himalayas to investigate a fresh spate of savage attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Lethal Beasts of Europe
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to European freshwaters to capture two aquatic beasts. Wade's investigation uncovers the man-eating capabilities of the Wels catfish. In Chernobyl, he is determined to find the gargantuan mutant terrorizing the radioactive waters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy journeys to Nepal where rumours of a deadly man-eating catfish have surfaced, and tries to determine if the Goonch has returned, or if a new monster is on the loose.

programme.title: River Monsters Goes Tribal
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade lives with some of the world's best tribal fishermen deep in the south pacific, who fish in some of the most shark infested waters. Wade has to survive using spears, bows and arrows and even spider webs to catch his fish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legendary Locations: North American Nightmares
programme.desc: From the freezing depths of the Alaskan waters, to the brackish channels of Florida, Jeremey investigates some of the most monstrous fish North America has to offer. Bull sharks, alligator gar, and near 500 pound Halibut are all on Jeremy's line.

programme.title: River Monsters: Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Tales of a body-snatching spirit called the Water Mama have reached Jeremy. With people disappearing without a trace, Jeremy is convinced there is a real river monster lurking behind the legend.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Sharks and Rays
programme.desc: Rivers and lakes can be home to 13-foot sharks, venomous stingrays, and a heavily armed relative: the freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Lethal Legends
programme.desc: Jeremy distinguishes fact from fiction and relives his creepiest encounters.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: O Come All Ye Mongoose
programme.desc: Keeper hope that dwarf mongoose couple, Cooper and Mini, may deliver some new babies in time for Christmas, but it's not an easy ride.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Make Way for Baby Giraffe
programme.desc: Giraffe Orla is pregnant, but with the size of a giraffe calf and the length of their legs, the birth is always a risky process. As she goes into labor during the day, the keepers must watch from the sidelines, but will baby Narus arrive safely?

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Disappearance of the Warty Pig
programme.desc: Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake and decides to escape. She can't be found overnight, despite a major search by the keepers.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Penguin House Hunters
programme.desc: Humboldt penguins Almond and Walnut go house hunting, but an intruder is eyeing up their turf.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: South Shore Score

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: A Mansion for Mom

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Mom's Million
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a woman gives her son her old condo in Ponte Verde Beach, FL.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: California Chick House
programme.desc: A young-at-heart grandmother wants to buy the perfect "chick house" after a $785,000 PowerBall win. David Bromstad helps her find an adorable home big enough to entertain her huge family but small enough to maintain by herself.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Million Dollar Bull's-Eye
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol purchase a small, rundown condo on the Vegas Strip for $117,000. Comps in the area are running around $150,000, so the couple knows they'll have to stick to a tight budget to make this one pay off.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bliss in the 'Burbs

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: South Shore Score

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Maine Attraction

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Florida Dreaming

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Milk Money

programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail

programme.title: Snapped: Julene Simko

programme.title: Snapped: Jackie Ray
programme.desc: A homicide investigation in Gig Harbor, Washington reveals the dark lengths one woman will go to for her family's safety.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Smell of Death
programme.desc: A rash of young men go missing around Chicago during the 1970's. When bodies start washing up in the river a pattern emerges. A small piece of evidence leads police to the house of a model citizen where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Snapped: Angela Stoldt
programme.desc: A missing person case goes cold until a nervous breakdown leads to a confession.

programme.title: Snapped: Jennifer Morrisey

programme.title: Snapped: Kelly Cochran

programme.title: Cold Justice: Home Alone

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: When four young misfits are transported to an alternate universe, they take on altered physical forms and new abilities. Together they must learn to harness their new powers and save Earth from an old friend who's now an enemy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trust But Clarify
programme.desc: Lisa and Bart investigate Krusty's suspicious new 'Krustaceans' candy. Meanwhile, Homer wants a promotion at the nuclear plant and asks Marge to help him dress the part, and news anchor Kent Brockman struggles to find his feet in the changing media world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There Will Be Buds
programme.desc: Homer gets roped into coaching the kids’ lacrosse team with Milhouse’s dad, Kirk, who is in desperate need of a friend. When Kirk gets too clingy, Homer vents about how much of a loser he is.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Havana Wild Weekend
programme.desc: When the Retirement Castle and the V.A. Hospital can't solve Grampa's health issues, the Simpsons decide to take a family trip to Cuba to get him cheap medical care.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dad Behavior
programme.desc: Homer finds a new app that makes his life much easier and outsources his father-son bonding. Meanwhile, Grampa finds that he is about to be a father again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Traction Hero
programme.desc: A workplace accident leaves Homer in a cast, and in a position to sue Mr. Burns. This leaves Marge unfulfilled, so she turns to an unexpected source for romance. Meanwhile, Lisa is made 'Bus Monitor' and tries to keep the peace.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pork and Burns
programme.desc: When Marge becomes obsessed with a Japanese style of living, the Simpsons must part with any item that no longer brings them joy. For Homer, this means finding a new home for the family pig.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fatzcarraldo

programme.desc: Guests include Sandra Oh, Stanley Tucci, Rob Beckett, Romesh Ranganathan, Oti Mabuse and Niall Horan.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost
programme.desc: A dead man operates through a medium in order to protect his girlfriend and to investigate his own murder.

programme.title: Movie: Inferno
programme.desc: Robert Langdon suddenly wakes up in a hospital with amnesia. Implicated in a crime, he must evade the authorities while finding clues that point to a terrible virus. He must follow Dante's path to find a secret weapon capable of destroying the world.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Yellowstone
programme.desc: In 1985, wolves were released back into Yellowstone National Park. The re-introduction of the predator has set off a cascade of events through the food chain.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham reveals how deadly poisonous frogs can saves lives, why we see faces in everything and how one woman's pants spontaneously burst into flame.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the mysteries behind a glacier that bleeds red, finds out how an electrician got tattooed by a lightning bolt and uncovers the remarkable story of a man with a tooth for an eye.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris discovers the secrets behind a flame-filled firenado, unearths a very bizarre looking living rock and meets a team of oversized rats who save lives.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham uncovers the cause of some mysterious holes in the Russian tundra, finds an underwater lake and meets the creator of a canon built especially for salmon.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham unlocks the secrets behind the world's weirdest events, from a bird-killing solar death ray to a monkey that's learned first aid.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: From his base in an abandoned town in the Nevada desert, host Chris Packham explores fascinatingly bizarre stories from around the world. In this episode, Chris uncovers the secrets of suspiciously fishy oil slick and what's making a lemming very angry.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Exploring everything from animal oddities to crazy weather, medical marvels and remarkable natural phenomena, host Chris Packham, uncovers the world's weirdest events, including a man who gets drunk without touching a drop of alcohol.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston Extended Stay: Tempt Not a Desperate Man
programme.desc: The survivor of a vicious attack shares his story, in the hopes that other inmates will never commit such violence. But for another inmate it's too late to turn back the clock and the pain of incarceration ha taken a toll.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston Extended Stay: Suicide Watch
programme.desc: The survivor of a vicious attack shares his story, in the hopes that other inmates will never commit such violence. But for another inmate it's too late to turn back the clock. And now the pain of incarceration has begun to take a toll.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: And Baby Make Three?
programme.desc: An inmate, who performs violence-themed rap on stage, is in jail for assaulting his girlfriend and is about to return to the streets. Another inmate worker deals with the pressures of creating the jail’s most popular dish.

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio Extended Stay: A House Divided
programme.desc: Former gang members attempt to leave deadly rivalries behind. But for some, the past is anything but resolved. Then, the men in another housing unit deal with a completely different set of issues.

programme.title: Lockup: Louisville Extended Stay: Lightning Voltz
programme.desc: Louisville is a city that knows good times. But when good times go bad, you go to The Louisville Metro Department of Corrections Jail. In this hour, a lunchtime dispute turns violent and one inmate learns crime doesn't pay.

programme.title: Lockup: Fairfax Extended Stay: Solitary

programme.desc: A gang member with a violent past and a long disciplinary record in jail tries to convince staff he's changed. Another inmate, once a victim of prison rape, lobbies to do his time in isolation.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: The Inca capital of Cusco was said to be the site of untold gold and riches, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the secrets behind this mighty empire's fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Flight Risk
programme.desc: In Georgia, a suspected drug dealer won't go down without a fight. In Ohio, police fear for their lives when faced with an ambush from a hidden gunman. After a high-speed chase, a fleeing driver has one more surprise for Macomb County Deputies.

programme.title: Murder on the Line
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered in her home, a wiretap leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Doctor Will See You
programme.desc: Devoted family man Dr. David Cornbleet is brutally killed in his office. His daughter finds him, bound and gagged, in a pool of blood. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to David's killer in this twisted tale.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Michigan City Murder
programme.desc: On April 23, 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga is found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office. Surveillance cameras in the area may have filmed the fatal encounter.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: See No Evil: Shadow of Hope
programme.desc: On December 26th 2011, Hope Melton vanishes after being run off a country road. CCTV footage from a nearby gas station reveals a suspicious orange car that seems to have followed her out of the parking lot.

programme.title: Murder on the Line
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered in her home, a wiretap leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: See No Evil: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: On October 26th, 2009, widower Philip Gatusso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo, North Dakota. As his in-laws drive across states to care for their now orphaned granddaughter, detectives to turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video.

programme.title: See No Evil: Random Sighting
programme.desc: Tosha Lampkin is in Shreveport, Louisiana visiting family. After a late-night trip for food, Tosha disappears. Her burnt out rental car is discovered... along with Tosha's remains. CCTV cameras provide detectives with their only lead on her killers.

programme.title: Who Was the Weepy-Voiced Killer?
programme.desc: After a man with a somber voice calls 911 to report his own murders, a police investigation unfolds to try and prevent others from falling victim to his hand.

programme.title: The Happy Face Killer: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: As Melissa Moore grew older, the admiration she had for her father Keith Jesperson, was replaced by fear. Her most horrific revelation would be learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Watch Your Children
programme.desc: In the summer of 2002, five-year-old Samantha Runnion is playing with a friend in front of their homes in Stanton, California. Suddenly, a man appears and snatches Samantha, dragging her into his car. The race is on to find her - and the man responsible.

programme.title: Predator at Large: It Was A Thrill To Him
programme.desc: Women are bring murdered in Washington County, Oregon. A serial killer is one step ahead of the police. The community lives in fear. But only after more bloodshed do residents discover that the brutal killer has been living in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: Predator at Large: We're Talking About A Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman and her infant son vanish on a walk to their local corner store, the close-knit town of Deerfield Beach is terrified. When the woman turns up dead, the community is convinced that they have a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: Predator at Large: He's Gonna Do It to Your Daughter
programme.desc: The peace of Raynham, Massachussets is forever shattered when cheerleader Mary Lou Arruda goes missing two days after her 15th birthday. The vast search effort to find her ends nine weeks later in the Freetown Forest, with a chilling discovery.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bang Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A couple who trades the city for the country soon find themselves in conflict with the gun shop owners across the street. Mutual video cameras record threats, fights and growing hostilities that finally lead to shots fired and blood spilled.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind heat-and-eat barbecue from Farm Rich Smokehouse, the super yellow color of French's Mustard and the sweet-sour punch of Mt. Olive Bread and Butter Pickles.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Savor the Flavor
programme.desc: Savor the flavor of some tasty treats, from Eli's scrumptious Bavarian Apple Tart to Necco's classic bite-size Mary Jane. Then, the mystery of the orange-colored, banana-flavored Circus Peanuts is solved.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Tongue Twister
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro tries Warheads Extreme Sour Hard Candy, a treat that almost requires a warning label, sees how Frank's RedHot gets its heat and takes a peek at a dynamite mole sauce from Rico Chicken Tamales.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger Mooking loves a great sandwich, and searches the country for the top 15 sandwiches.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fermentation Nation
programme.desc: Alton thinks outside the bottle by using beer and wine as key ingredients to prepare several tasty dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Curious Case of Curry
programme.desc: Alton discusses how curry was an English dish, which made India famous.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Pork
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the code to true 'cue: brined pork, a flower pot, a trashcan, hardwood smoke and a lot of patience, resulting in a delicious Pulled Pork.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Last Stand
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Sister Sam / Perfect Chemistry
programme.desc: Patrick's big sister Samantha comes for a visit; Sandy and Plankton bond over their shared love of science.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: As Seen on TV/ Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Krabs makes a low-budget commercial; accused of stealing, Squidward quits his job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Scaredy Pants/ I Was a Teenage Gary
programme.desc: Bob is determined to scare everyone at the Halloween party; Bob becomes a snail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a splinter at work and tries to remove it before Mr. Krabs finds out and sends him home early.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Free Samples / Home Sweet Rubble
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free Krabby Patties to win back customers after Plankton drives them away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco
programme.desc: Annoyed by Spongebob for the last time, Squidward issues him a restraining order. Plankton steals a Krabby Patty from the Krusty Krab unaware it's really an art piece by famous artist Fiasco.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Slash and Destroy
programme.desc: The Turtles find themselves being hunted by a new threat: another mutant turtle called Slash, who has a personal vendetta against the brothers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Kraang Conspiracy
programme.desc: Feeling left out of the action, April insists on joining the Turtles on a mission to TCRI, where they learn a shocking secret about April's past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Good, the Bad and Casey Jones
programme.desc: After encountering mutants and ninjas, Casey Jones decides to take on 'pure evil' alone. When he meets Raphael, the two hot-headed fighters must put their dislike for each other aside and work together against a common foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Fungus Humungous
programme.desc: A fungus mutant spreading through the sewers causes the Turtles and April to experience their worst fears as Leonardo must face his greatest fear-losing his team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead Rewired
programme.desc: When Donnie upgrades Metalhead's artificial intelligence, he must decide if he can trust a sentient Metalhead or if he has created a new foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Of Rats and Men
programme.desc: When the Rat King returns, Splinter must overcome his guilt and fear of the Rat King controlling his mind in order to defeat his foe once and for all.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Poppy Starr/ The Spooky One
programme.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Then, Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Race to the Top/ Meet Harl Hubbs

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Live and Dangerous
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are invited are invited by internet celebrity Frankini to a party, but when they arrive they find that Frankini has plans to reveal their identities to the world.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Stuck in Two Holes
programme.desc: When Captain Man and Kid Danger are each stuck in a hole, Charlotte and Jasper must help.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Green Fingers

programme.title: The Thundermans: On the Straight and Arrow

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebe vs. Max: The Sequel
programme.desc: Phoebe's first assignment as a superhero is to protect Hiddenville, which proves too easy until she challenges Max to inject some mischief into their sleepy hometown.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Why You Buggin'?
programme.desc: After discovering that Link's ex-girlfriend is a secret supervillain who wants Link for herself, Phoebe enlists Max's help in exposing her rival's true motives.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Exit Stage Theft

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones

programme.desc: Murphy's choices plunge the Guiding Hope crew deeper in Nia's game. Jess continues to grow suspicious of the close-door meetings between Felix and Murphy. Dean tries to keep Chloe away from Murphy. Darnell fails to deliver on his commitment.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Mom and Pop Store

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Support Your Local Samuel
programme.desc: Samuel contemplates moving back to Africa when he receives a letter from his parents saying they're struggling financially.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Wedding Singer

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Jimmy 5 Is Alive

programme.title: Judge Mathis

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Beat by the Car/ Poorly Handled Burial
programme.desc: Man sues ex-girlfriend for parking tickets and towing; man sues owner of cemetery for emotional distress.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A plaintiff claims he was tricked by a woman he met online, but she claims he made inappropriate advances. Then, a business owner claims a customer has failed to remit payment, but the defendant claims her credit card was stolen.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mom, I Was Raped at 12, Please Believe Me
programme.desc: Celeste says that she was raped by a man that her family trusted, but her family is dismissing the story entirely. Then, Laquessea claims to have been raped by a family member, but the rest of her family refuses to believe it happened.

programme.title: Maury: Why Did You Name Your Baby After Me ... I'm Not the Dad!
programme.desc: Montenisha made posted fliers around her her town calling Deandre a 'Missing Dead Beat', but Deandre isn't sure he's her baby's father. Zane is denying Chelsea's daughter. Juwan wants to make sure he's the father of Jedidiah's baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Dad, Stop Dating My Friends

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Parents at War Over Kids

programme.title: Movie: College
